titleStmt.title: SII 34.187: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 187. Ratnagiri, Kulittalai Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the rock below the Chōḷēśvara shrine in front of the Harāḷakēśvari temple on the hill.

summary.p: Chōḻa, Rājakēsarivarman Kulōttuṅga I, •••badi 6, Thursday = A.D. 1070-1120.
Much mutilated. It seems to record purchase of tax-free land by a merchant from the sabhā of Kuḻittaṇḍalai for the temple of Tiruvāppōkkimalai.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī pukaḻ cūḻnta puṇari ḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnEmiyaḷavun tannEmi naṭappa viḷaṅku jeyamakaḷai IḷaṅkOp pa
ruvattu cakkarakōṭṭattu vikkiramattoḻilāṟ putumaṇam puṇarntu matuvāraiyīṭṭam vayi
rākarattu vāriyil nuṉaikkontaḷavaraiyar tantaṉamiriya vāḷuṟai kaḻittut tōḷvalikāṭṭip pō
rppari naṭātti kīrttiyainiṟutti vaṭaticaivākai cūṭit tenticait tēmaru kamalappūma
kaḷ potumaiyil ponni Āṭai naṉnilappāvaiyum taṉimaiyum tavir puṉitaru tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyil cūṭi tannaṭi Iraṇṭum taṭamu
ṉai maṉuvāṟu perukak kaliyāṟu vaṟuppac ceṅkōl ticai toru cella veṇkuṭai Iru nilaviḷaākam Eṅkaṇum taṉā
ṉimēruvi puli viḷaiyāṭa vāṟkaṭaṟ ṟīvāntarattu pūpālar ti ṭu tanta kalañcēr kaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya teṉṉavaṉ karuntalai paruntalai tiṭa
taṉi poṉnakar puṟattiṭaik kiṭappa viṉnāḷ piṟakkulap piṟaipō niṟayuḻai ṉuñ colletir kōṭiṟṟallatu taṉkai viletir kōṭā ṟal vikkalak kallatar naṅkili tuṭa
ṅki maṇalūr naṭuveṉṉat tuṅkapattiraiyaḷavum Eṅkaṇum paṭṭa veṅkaḷiṟu viṭṭa taṉmāṉamuṅ kūṟiṉa vīramuṅkiṭappa Eṟiṉa
malaikaḷuñ cūḻanṟuṭaintōṭi viḻunta kaṭalkaḷun talaivirittalamarak kuṭaticait tannāḷ kaittut taāḷun tāṉaiyum palamutuku payantetirmāṟiya cayapperun tiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻiyuñ celvi
yum vāḷāvikaṭalinar maṭantaiyarīṭṭamum kuṭutta veṅkari niṟaiyuṅ kaṅka maṇṭalamuñ ciṅkaḷaventum ṇṭum Oruvicaik kaikkoṇṭīṇṭiya pukaḻoṭum pāṇṭimaṇṭalaṅ koḷḷat tiru
vuḷḷattaṭaittaruḷi veḷḷavaruparittaraṅkamum porukarik kalaṅkaḷun tantiravāriyu muṭaittāy vantu vaṭa kaṭal teṉkaṭalaṭarvatu pōla taṉperuñcēṉai Ēvi varum poruta moykaḷattañci veruneḷittōṭi Ara
ṇenappukka kāṭaṟattuṭaittu nāṭaṭippaṭuttu maṟṟivar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poṟṟai veñcuramēṟṟi koṟṟa vijeyastampanticaipeṟa niṟutti muttil calāpamu muttamiḻ potiyalu matta veṅkarippaṭaiyac ce
kaikkoṇṭaruḷit tennāṭṭellai kāṭṭiya kaṭalmalai nāṭuḷḷa cāvēṟellām tani vicumpēṟṟa yataṉ varu vaṉaik kuṟu k koṭṭāruḷ nilai riṭṭat tiṟalkoḷ siṁhā
ntaruppuyattalaṅkalum pōla vīramun tiyākamum viḷaṅkap pārmicai kaṇai siṁhāsanattu vīṟṟiruntaruḷiya kōvirājakēcaripanmarāṉa cakkaravattikaḷ śrīkolōttu
svastiśrī śraya vaḷanāṭṭu mīkOṭṭu nāṭṭu [brahmadeya]ṅ kuḻittaṇṭalai peruṅkuṟi sabhaiyOm Ivvāṭṭai nāyaṟṟu Aparapakṣattu viyāḻakkiḻamaiyum ṣaṭṭiyum pe ḷ Ivvūr naṭuviṟ
jendracOḻa tirumaṇṭapattu tu kūṭṭa kuṟaivaṟakkūṭi Iruntu paṇi Innāṭṭu nnāṭṭut tiruvā hātEvar caṇḍeśvade kkuttiruma
nilamāvatu Ivvūr tu mātēva vatikku kiḻakku kaḷḷivāykkālukku teṟku kaṇṇāṟṟu n tuṇṭattu tu ni ṉāl tiruvulakaḷanta
ṉṟu mākkāṇi mun=tirikaikkīḻ Orumāvaraiyum viṟṟukkuṭuttu koṇṭa Uḷpaṭa Innilattukku lāka koṇṭa kācu 10 kācu 2 10 Irupatum ccantrātitta
ṅkaḷē Iṟaiyiṟukkak kaṭavōmāka viṟṟukkuṭuttōm tiruvāppōkkimalai bhaiyōm Innilattukku I v vilaiyāvaṇam pi māva ṭaṉāvirai
kavum Ituvallatu poruvāru māvaṟutip poruṭcella lātākavum kkoṇṭu viṟṟu paṇañ
ñceytu kuṭuttōm tiruvāṭpōkkimalai ṇḍeśvara
ma nārāyaṇanārum kaviṇiyaṉ nārāyaṇanā tiruvāṭpōkki
kaḷāṉa Alaṅkārappiriyanēṉ Ivai Enneḻuttu ppaṭi Aṟivēṉ pāratāyaṉ
kaviṇiyaṉ maṇiyaṉ Iravi ṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu yāneṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Aṟivēṉ
Ippaṭikku In nilattu
tiruvamutukku cōḻapāṇṭiyapurattu viyāpāri
tiruvamutaricikku
kal veṭṭuvittāṉ
Digital edition of SII 34.187 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
